title: Dark Factory: OpenClaw Ships Faster Than You Can Read the Diff — Vincent Koc, OpenClaw
summary: OpenClaw achieved 3,000 commits in a single day by orchestrating 60-70 agents in parallel coding swim lanes. The approach emphasizes managing token efficiency and interpreting agent reasoning outputs to identify failures, representing a shift from prompt engineering toward large-scale agent coordination.
